entities.name: SPEED BREEDING
entities.description: A time-saving approach to accelerate the breeding cycle by increasing generations per year

entities.name: GENETIC IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing the genetic makeup of a crop

entities.name: GENETIC RECOMBINATION
entities.description: The rearrangement of genetic material during breeding

entities.name: FAST GENERATION RECONSTITUTION
entities.description: The rapid production of subsequent generations in plant breeding

entities.name: PLANT BREEDING
entities.description: The science of changing the traits of plants to produce desired characteristics

entities.name: GENETIC GAIN
entities.description: The increase in the average value of a trait in a population over time

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area

entities.name: SEED QUALITY
entities.description: The physical and chemical properties of seeds

entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: The country where chickpea research improvement was conducted

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum, the target crop for speed breeding in this manual

entities.name: CONTROLLED ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: An environment where variables like light and temperature are managed

entities.name: GROWTH CHAMBER
entities.description: A specific type of controlled environment used for plant growth

entities.name: SPRING WHEAT
entities.description: Triticum aestivum, a crop that achieved 6 generations per year via speed breeding

entities.name: DURUM WHEAT
entities.description: Triticum durum, a crop that achieved 6 generations per year via speed breeding

entities.name: BARLEY
entities.description: Hordeum vulgare, a crop that achieved 6 generations per year via speed breeding

entities.name: PEA
entities.description: Pisum sativum, a crop that achieved 6 generations per year via speed breeding

entities.name: CANOLA

entities.name: NORMAL GLASSHOUSE CONDITIONS
entities.description: Standard greenhouse environments

entities.name: UNCONTROLLED OPEN FIELD CONDITION
entities.description: Natural field environments without artificial control

entities.name: MOLECULAR BREEDING
entities.description: Breeding using molecular markers and tools

entities.name: SINGLE SEED DESCENT
entities.description: A technique used to advance generations quickly
